step_rationale: Proline-synthesis enzyme mediating cardioprotection against myocardial infarction.
mechanism: PYCR1 (pyrroline-5-carboxylate reductase 1) catalyzes proline synthesis and offers cardioprotection, reducing myocardial infarction severity.

references.title: Metabolomic and transcriptomic studies of improvements in myocardial infarction due to Pycr1 deletion.
references.journal: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
